name: A664TriggerFrame
title: A664TriggerFrame
description: This function triggers the transmission of a single a664Frame "aFrame" either immediately or respecting the BAG. To forward an AFDX frame in the analysis branch, use the function output().

parameters.name: aFrame
parameters.description: The frame object to be scheduled.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Triggering mode. 0: Immediate (transmit once without considering BAG) 1: SingleShot (transmit once according to BAG)

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
